summary:
Recovery: Excellent

Reading: Nothing's flagging today — your knees, joints, shoulders, and neck are all quiet, none of your usual watch areas asking for attention. You're someone who earns recovery through steadiness and consistency rather than dramatic swings, and today is that pattern paying off: you came back clean, rested enough, and your system feels genuinely calm and ready.

Performance: Push hard. You came in well above your normal recovery and your body's clearly recharged, so this is a green light to go after it — just keep your form honest if you load up heavy.

Transit: none
